hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then template=$(cat .github/pull_request_template.md); msg="STOP — your gh pr create --body MUST use the exact template below or CI will fail:\n\n$template"; jq -n --arg m "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":$m}}'; fi
